title: Mass Open Onlines Courses
content: Galgotias University has offered multiple MOOCS from SWAYAM/NPTEL under credit transfer scheme. Students from various school have responded very positively to this and have enrolled in large numbers. These courses are proctored and have dedicated mentor faculty conducting contact hours as per schedule. List of MOOCs offered at present - School | Programm | Semester | GU Course Name Opted for Credit Transfer Course | Name and code of MOOC course | Course offering platform | SOB | BBA | IV | BBCC 2009 Financial Management | Financial Management | CEC | SOB | MBA | II | MBDS 6004 Entrepreneurship | Entrepreneurship | NPTEL | SOL | LLB | VI | Human Rights | Human Rights Law | CEC | SOL | BBA,BBA,LLB | VI | Environmental Law | Environmental Law | CEC | SOH | B.Sc , BHM | IV | Research Methodology | Academic and Research Report | NPTEL | SBAS and SOH | ENVS course in BSc (HM) and BHM | II | Environmental studies | ENVS1003-Certificate course in environmental sustainability | NPTEL | SBBS | CR (BSc) | II, IV & VI | Basic Biotechnology, Clinical Diagnostic Lab and TQM respectively from Semester II, IV & VI | SNMC0001- Current regulatory requirements for conducting clinical trials in India for investigational new drug/new drug (Version 2.0) | NPTEL | SBBS | CR (MSc ) | II | 1 credit from Regulatory affairs and ethics in clinical research and 1 from epidemiological principles in clinical research | SNMC0001- Current regulatory requirements for conducting clinical trials in India for investigational new drug/new drug (Version 2.0) | NPTEL | SFC | BBA (FIA) | II | Statistics for Business Decisions | Statistics for Business Decisions (BBAF1006) | NPTEL | SFC | BBA (FIA) | IV | Human Resource Management | Human Resource Management (BBAF2022) | NPTEL | SFC | B.Com (hons.)/ B.Com (hons.)
